expected_error.missing: data block whose text looks like script-bearing HTML; wire-format-legal but PRD-600 emits a warning. Producers SHOULD NOT use data blocks as a content channel.

_note: The serialized text is not parseable JSON. A producer that intends to convey HTML or scripts has used the wrong block type. PRD-102-R31 forbids consumers from rendering data-block contents as content.
